message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 手札を出す

actor "進行役" as GameMaster
participant "自分: プレイヤー" as PlayerSelf
participant "隣のプレイヤー: プレイヤー" as NeighborPlayer
participant "隣のプレイヤーの手札: 手札" as NeighborHand

GameMaster -> PlayerSelf : 順番を指名する(隣のプレイヤー)
activate PlayerSelf
PlayerSelf -> NeighborPlayer : 手札を出す()
activate NeighborPlayer
NeighborPlayer --> PlayerSelf : 手札
deactivate NeighborPlayer
PlayerSelf -> NeighborHand : カードを引く()
activate NeighborHand
NeighborHand --> PlayerSelf : カード
deactivate NeighborHand
deactivate PlayerSelf

@enduml
```
